2026-03-15

Beware the Ides of March, for it shall snow a fuckton, and you won’t want to do anything at all… But I’ll start the “UI components” section of the Astro blog tutorial anyway.

Hm. Looks like component names have to start with a capital letter. Not the file, just the name used within the page. But now I have a very simple navigation for the main pages of the site working.
